name: Dingxin Software

name: Wantong Logistics

name: Huatong Tech
notes: Supplier A. Suspended on March 15 due to product quality issues (router batch return rate exceeded threshold). Cooperation halted pending completion of quality remediation and re-evaluation by the procurement department.

name: Zhongke Parts
notes: Supplier B. Primarily supplies network cables and UPS power units. Deliveries are stable and quality is satisfactory.

name: Tianhe Servers
notes: Supplier C. Deliveries are on schedule, but there is a capacity adjustment planned for late March. Need to communicate scheduling in advance.
